com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: If features in the product can be changed when creating QuoteProductFeatures
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Allow Feature Changes
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: zqu__Allow_Feature_Changes__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: Product link to catalog sync history
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Catalog Sync History
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: zqu__Catalog_Sync_History__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The Effective End Date of the Product.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Effective End Date
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: zqu__EffectiveEndDate__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The Effective Start Date of the Product.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Effective Start Date
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: zqu__EffectiveStartDate__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: This field will be auto-generated if no value specified.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: SKU
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: zqu__SKU2__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: This field will be auto-generated if no value specified.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: SKU (Deprecated)
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: zqu__SKU__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The Zuora Id (external primary key) of this Product.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Zuora Id
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: zqu__ZuoraId__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.PicklistEntry.value: Konnect Africa - Go Direct HOME Products

com.sforce.soap.partner.PicklistEntry.value: Konnect Africa - Go Direct PRO Products

com.sforce.soap.partner.PicklistEntry.label: Saint Helena, Ascension and Tristan da Cunha
South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: Indicates a record used for Marketing Cloud testing
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Test SFMC
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Test_SFMC__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Ready to be billed in GCRM
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Ready_to_be_billed_in_GCRM__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.calculatedFormula: IF( TEXT( Family ) == 'Plan' , 'SUBSCRIPTION_FEE', IF( TEXT(Family) == 'Add-On' , 'ADD-ON_FEE', IF( TEXT(Family) == 'Option' , IF( ISBLANK( TEXT( Option_Fee__c ) ) , 'OPTION_FEE', TEXT( Option_Fee__c ) ) , '') ) )
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Label
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Label__c
